hero.title: Together, We Can Make a Difference.
hero.description: Discover meaningful causes, support people who need help, or start your own fundraising campaign.

howItWorks.title: How FundBridge Works
howItWorks.description: Start supporting meaningful causes in just a few simple steps.

steps.title: Discover a Campaign
steps.description: Explore verified fundraising campaigns and find a cause you want to support.

steps.title: Make a Contribution
steps.description: Donate securely and help campaign creators move closer to their fundraising goals.

steps.title: Make an Impact
steps.description: Your contribution becomes part of a collective effort to create meaningful change.

campaignSection.title: Urgent Campaigns
campaignSection.description: Support campaigns that need your help the most.
campaignSection.errorMessage: Unable to load campaigns. Please try again later.
campaignSection.emptyMessage: No campaigns are available right now.

cta.title: Have a Cause That Needs Support?
cta.description: Start your fundraising campaign and connect with people who want to make a difference.
